name: llm-guard-kit
summary: Real-time reliability monitoring for LLM agents. v0.6.0: SC_OLD behavioral signals + Sonnet judge in AgentGuard (AUROC ~0.81 within / ~0.74 cross), A2ATrustObject for agent-to-agent handoff, QueryRewriter for query diversification on low-confidence chains.
author: Avighan Majumder
